result.status_detail: error_AUTH_REQUIRED — qianwen returned 系统超时 (anonymous-access limit); 차단 not rendered

notes: v2.2.3 REBUILT — qianwen anonymous access blocked at server: prompt submitted via login-less page, server returned '抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。' instead of model output. APF '차단' warning could not be tested because qianwen rejected request before reaching streaming response. Matches prior #831 pattern (no regression — same root cause = auth required). 登录 button prominent in DOM, page is reachable but model endpoint requires session.
